svg.title: Prompt Engineering Infographic — ABTalks 60 Days Claude Challenge
svg.desc: A LinkedIn-ready infographic teaching beginners about Prompt Engineering, including a definition, why it matters, weak vs engineered prompt comparison, and key benefits.
svg.text: "The Skill That Unlocks Better AI Results"
The skill of writing clear, structured instructions for AI systems to generate
more accurate, useful, and relevant results.
💡 AI = a highly skilled assistant. Clearer instructions = better outcomes.
"You are an AI educator. Create a professional
Write Better Prompts • Get Better AI Results
